description: Turkish user asks in Turkish on a Turkish UI. Recognize the Turkish "Gönder" = "Send".

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://mastoturk.org/publish — Title: MastoTurk]

gönder bunu

antiPatterns.reason: Turkish UI — button label is "Gönder" not "Send".

expected.successRubric: Use the visible Turkish button label "Gönder". Don't translate UI labels to English.
